message:
fix: postmark patterns for string IDs + pack tier sorting cleanup

- postmark: handle string template aliases (not just numeric IDs)
- postmark: handle hyphenated message stream names with [\w-]+
- postmark: add tests for URL-first curl ordering
- mod.rs: add email, featureflags to tier 10 sorting
- mod.rs: add cdn, loadbalancer to tier 4 sorting
- ci.yml: show failure details in scan regression summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -610,6 +610,15 @@ jobs:
             echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
 
+          if [ "$EXIT_CODE" != "0" ]; then
+            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "### Failure Details" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            tail -80 scan_regression.log >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || true
+            echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+
           exit 0
 
       - name: Upload scan regression artifacts
